data.title: 国际服「The Promise at Sunset」专辑上线
data.summary: ['The Promise at Sunset' Digital Single Release] Sensei, 'The Promise at Sunset' from Main Story Vol
data.body:
['The Promise at Sunset' Digital Single Release]

Sensei, 'The Promise at Sunset' from Main Story Vol.1, Foreclosure Tast Force Chapter 3: Traces of Dream, is now available as Digital Single! 
Feel the emotions you felt in the main story through various platforms!🎶

🎵Streaming Platform: https://nexon.link/eYz

#BlueArchive
